title: BEM-846 execute 845
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 13:07 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem845_verify_bem844_and_triad.json')
status_in=prev.get('status','unknown')
missing=prev.get('missing',[])
created_files=[]
if status_in=='triad_present':
    status='protocol_processing_selected'
    next_action='create agreed protocol from real Claude response'
elif status_in=='queue_pending_after_bem844':
    status='queue_tick_required'
    next_action='run fresh tick to process queue remaining from BEM-845'
elif status_in=='only_real_response_missing_no_queue':
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem846_real_response_explicit_retry.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v11','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-846 explicit retry for real Claude response; blocker files not accepted','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='real_response_explicit_retry_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify real Claude response'
elif status_in=='runtime_missing_no_queue':
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem846_runtime_explicit_retry.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v11','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-846 explicit retry for Claude runtime proof','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='runtime_explicit_retry_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify Claude runtime state'
elif status_in=='dispatch_results_missing_no_queue':
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem846_dispatch_result_explicit_retry.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v11','workflow':'codex-runner.yml','workflow_id':'codex-runner.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-846 explicit retry for dispatch result proof','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='dispatch_result_explicit_retry_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify workflow_dispatch_results'
else:
    # fallback: queue first missing proof directly.
    first=missing[0] if missing else 'unknown'
    wf='codex-runner.yml' if first=='workflow_dispatch_results' else 'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml'
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem846_fallback_'+first+'.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v11','workflow':wf,'workflow_id':wf,'ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-846 fallback retry for first missing proof '+first,'created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='fallback_first_missing_retry_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify first missing proof '+first
state={'bem':'BEM-846','status':status,'bem845_status':status_in,'bem845_missing':missing,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem846_execute_bem845_next.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem846_execute_bem845_next.md').write_text('# BEM-846 | Execute BEM-845 Next | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem846_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-846'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem846_execute_bem845_next.json','governance/reports/bem846_execute_bem845_next.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem846_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed BEM-845 next action by queuing explicit retry for the selected missing proof or selecting protocol processing')
"""
No issue comments.
